description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image. Define a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores the node_modules/ directory and includes untracked files. Add a deploy stage with a build_and_deploy_job that runs only on the master branch, sets the production environment with URL https://www.buytwitter.org, runs a before_script to globally install gulp, then executes npm install -q, copies config-prod.js to config.js, runs gulp build and gulp deploy. No services or artifacts are defined.
